issues.description: AnimBP declares many variables but very few are read in the AnimGraph (heuristic). 54 properties, 2 graph reads.
issues.how_to_fix:
1. Open the AnimBP > Class Defaults or My Blueprint panel
2. Find the flagged variable
3. Search for it in the AnimGraph (Ctrl+F)
4. If truly unused, delete it from My Blueprint

NOTE: Verify in editor — this check uses heuristics and may have false positives.
